description: You want to be a pro web builder, want it raw and basic then HTML editor is the deal. Easy error identification, SEO optimization which is vital after the website is uploaded on the server making the web content highly recognized on the web by search engines. A little complex but i still choose Coffee Cup Editor as my primary web editor.
author: Tobel A.
pros: The FTP upload feature makes coffee Cup an ideal HTML editor since you can easily upload the website without need of a third party software. further more, split screen and tag auto completion make the coding process easier.
cons: Coffee cup html editor proves a little complex since it needs a lot of coding knowledge.

description: HTML Editor is an excellent editor, providing similar features to Sublime Text and other titans of the field. It's been around for over two decades now, and it's easy to see why.
author: Jeremy D.
pros: For real coders looking for a proper web solution, this should be a first stop. Featuring code completion and live code updates, this is as competitive as any editor out there.
cons: HTML Editor is a quite bare-bones code editor, suitable only for professionals (or those learning to become pros). This is not an editor for those looking to edit a template with no coding experience.

review_title: Like a text editor is to ms word
description: When web sites were single pages, this was a fantastic tool. Now instead of cassette tapes, I use mp3 files (simile). Take the time to learn and use Wordp****
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very simple, great for editing a single html page
cons: It's like using a text editor vs learning wordpress

description: Overall my experience was super positive. This is the perfect editor for those learning to code without the need to know html/css fully
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The free version was so feature rich it allowed us to build some of our first landing pages right out the box. Publishing pages was simple and straight forward at the time there was no need to learn HTML or CSS with the wizard guiding us as we built it made it very simple.
cons: Lack of integration with other tools at the time, may be better now. More templates would have been helpful looking back as well.
author_profession: Coffee Cup Super Easy HTML Editor

review_title: Coffee Cup's HTML Editor Fast and Simple Way to get Online Presence
description: Our overall experience with HTML Editor has been enjoyable. The students in the entrepreneurship classes have enjoyed hosting our websites and editing them to their custom business plans each semester.
author: Justin N.
pros: HTML Editor's best feature by far is its pricing. It costs our organization less than $100/year to maintain our classroom website. Their software platform is very easy to use and out entrepreneurship classes have enjoyed using the web page.
cons: Some of the best features of the software are only included in the higher-priced packages like Web Form Builder. Being that we only use the software a couple of times a month paying for the top tier packages doesn't make a lot of sense for us.

description: HTML editor is great for any web developer to quickly and conveniently and directly edit their website and even the style pages. It opens and saves pages right on the server therefore everything is done in real time.
author: Tibor K.
pros: Fairly easy to use, easy to setup and configure, it allows you to directly access and edit your web pages and also gives you a quick preview before you publish them. There is even a function to preview your pages in different browsers like FireFox, Safari, MS Edge or Google Chrome, it is important to test your pages in different browsers because they use can look different. The app also connects to your server automatically and gives you a map of your website with the list of pages you can chose to edit.
cons: Can take some time to first configure to properly access your webserver such as enter the IP address and root directory where your files are located. The GUI interface is a also a bit outdated, could use some update.

review_title: A great one for web pages
description: HTML Editor creates beginning websites quickly and effortlessly, they are a delight to work with. HTML Editor's administration and structure are ideal for its users.
author: Chandrakeerthan P.
pros: HTML web page creation is quite simple using this editor. The addition of numerous HTML elements is simple and error-free thanks to the drag & drop tool. Even for HTML lists and tables, the tool creates the majority of the HTML code, so it's not a problem if you have trouble memorising the language's syntax. Another element that greatly increases flexibility in the development process is the live preview capability.
cons: HTML Editor is a very basic code editor that should only be used by experts (or those learning to become pros). Anybody wanting to alter a template without any coding knowledge should not use this editor.

review_title: CoffeeCup HTML Editor - The perfect HTML Editor
description: We have been using this editor for development of HTML and CSS code. Beginners in the project team like this tool very much for its user-friendliness and rich features. I highly recommend this software to all HTML designers and developers. Before you purchase this software, you can also try the Free version of this tool and check whether this suits your project requirements.
author: Vishal J.
pros: This editor makes it very easy to create web pages using HTML. The drag and drop tool for adding various HTML elements makes development quick and error free. The tool generates most of the HTML code (even for HTML lists and tables), no problem if you are not good at remembering the syntax of the language. Live Preview feature is another feature which adds great flexibility in the development process.
cons: Overall, this tool offers everything that an HTML designer/developer would need. I am not sure whether 3rd party tools can be integrated with this editor, as some projects do need such functionality.

review_title: Coffee Cup HTML EDITOR -Essential Software for Full, Efficient Functional HTML Use
description: Excellent, sound and very capable, wonderful, excellently organizied software managed for the HTML mid-level and beginning coders; the item for great low cost HTML editing remedies to your projectsd and just an enormously reat resource foir HTML.
author: Ian B.
pros: The whole format, from conception of your basic coding, realistic assessment of the software's excellent operality, to the fine resulting HTML code for web application for additions, manafacture of web pages to changes in one's code, itself.
cons: The only drawback to Coffee Cup software; to include this CoffeeCup HTML Editor, is and seemingly remains snobby HTML end-producers only satisfied by shelling out larger amounts of funds to receive merely extremely comparable HTML code; itself and their somewhat wary dissatisfaction with a great HTML editor, yet not forever; hopefully.

author: Ankit Kumar G.
pros: HTML Editor allows you the flexibility to start working on a website from scratch or edit an existing theme or template.
cons: User interface is relatively old. Learning curve is problematic. There are problems during work (error of different types)

review_title: An editor best for a small and quick web page development.
description: Using the tool for any quick change and fixes, the lightweight tool makes it very easy to perform these tasks.
author: Mehak A.
pros: It's a basic tool that can be used to develop simple to a bit complex web pages. It offers feature color-coded text which makes it easier to find and fix errors. The page stimulator helps to test the code.
cons: A feature that might be missing is the autosave option, this helps in preventing loss of code or updates in case of any failure.

description: I use HTML editor on-going in order to make changes to the HTML of my website which is a photography website. I am not a web designer, so for me it is important to find simple to use and intuitive software which I found HTML Editor to be.
author: Michael S.
pros: Fast and easy to use. I found HTML editor intuitive from install. The first time I used the program I was able to quickly figure out what I needed to do with little effort.
cons: I can't think of anything negative about the software. Using HTML editor is a big help for me since I am not a web designer, but manage my own website. This software makes it easy and comfotable.

author: Jonathan S.
pros: I enjoy using this software for our team because unlike other HTML editors, lack of computer knowledge isn't a problem which makes learning the system fairly easy to train.
cons: While it is a simple system, I do feel that it lacks some of the more complex features I would like to see for longterm use , but overall it's a great software.

description: Overall, it is a good program that allows someone to make html changes to their webpages.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The program allows people to edit html to make changes to webpages and all its contents.
cons: It can be very complicated for someone who is not knowledgeable about making and designing webpages.

author: Richard W.
pros: HTML Editor is a very simple and easy to use HTML editor (as name implies) which anyone can use to start their web pages.
cons: It is very basic and not the most interesting to look at. Lacks features of other common editors such as Dreamweaver.

author: Gayani K.
pros: It is very user friendly.It is very useful for learning the html language.
cons: Nothing special. The software interface is old.

review_title: Easy WYSIWYG editor for everyday publisher
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that if you don't have time to learn how to write your own code, you can use this software to construct a website with the information you are required to publish.
cons: I appreciate the interface and how it uses dialog boxes to build the content, but I am into the simple editors that use a series of shortcuts and keystrokes to insert a block of code to be manipulated.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Handy program to build your own websites. Good for New and Experienced Designers.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Overall this program works very well and allows you to design all aspects of your own website. The Menus are fairly easy to follow and there are plenty of help files and videos available out there to help you learn.
cons: Being a more advanced/raw code website designer I find this handy, but not what I need day to day. But that is a preference over a Con.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use for first time coders
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The tag library is very handy for quick, correct insertion into code.
cons: A bit more depth of description for some functions would aid the uninitiated in web design.

review_title: SIMPLE way to organize your website and for non-technical folks to make awesome pages
description: Non technical folks can make amazing pages and perform CSS magic with out needing to be a software developer.
author: devaun F.
pros: It is a pretty simple way for non-technical people to get started. There is a bunch of quick start options that don't require you to be an expert in css or html. It allows you to organize your work, and gives you a bunch of standard components that you can just drop into your pages. The auto css/html made excellent looking pages in minutes.
cons: As a developer, I like hands on. Some of the components that you drop may limit your abilities to customize. But, if you are a Front End developer, you would roll your own.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: HTML Editor is easy to use for someone that doesn't work with HTML every day. It allows us to fix or post whatever small job without pulling any hair out. CoffeeCup has a number of great products for working on websites. Their support team is patient and courteous. That is greatly appreciated by a non-professional website builder.

pros: Easy to use
